title: hepetis karwinskyana
intro: Hepetis karwinskyana, also known as Mexican tea or Karwinsky's tea, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and acting as an antibacterial agent. Hepetis karwinskyana is commonly prepared as a herbal tea by infusing its leaves in hot water, and it can also be found in capsule or tincture form for those who prefer a more concentrated preparation.
